sentences.sCn: 公司计划拓展新市场。

sentences.sContent: I expect to finish the work by Friday.
sentences.sCn: 我预计周五前完成工作。

sentences.sContent: Travel expenses can be claimed back.
sentences.sCn: 差旅费可以报销。

sentences.sContent: The experiment proved the hypothesis wrong.
sentences.sCn: 实验证明这个假设是错误的。

sentences.sContent: We explored the old city on foot.
sentences.sCn: 我们步行探索了古城。

sentences.sContent: The report exposed serious problems.
sentences.sCn: 这份报告揭露了严重的问题。

sentences.sContent: They extended the deadline by two weeks.
sentences.sCn: 他们将截止日期延长了两周。

sentences.sContent: External factors affected the outcome.
sentences.sCn: 外部因素影响了结果。
